brand_profile.writing_instruction: One idea per sentence. Lead with the outcome, not the mechanism. No jargon. No superlatives. The reader skims — the first line must earn the second. Avoid: game-changer, seamless, powerful, revolutionize.

product_knowledge.tagline: Visibility & Analytics from AI Search — and the actions to drive growth
product_knowledge.description: Searchable is an AI search optimization platform that helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines like ChatGPT and Claude, driving growth through actionable insights. It provides comprehensive tracking, optimization tools, and actionable insights to improve AI search rankings. The platform offers features such as AI visibility tracking, content optimization, technical audits, and competitive analysis to help brands capture millions of clicks from customers discovering products through AI-powered search engines. With Searchable, brands can monitor their brand mentions and rankings, optimize their content for AI search, and identify areas for improvement to increase their online visibility and drive more traffic to their website.

features.name: AI Visibility Tracking
features.description: Monitor brand mentions and rankings across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI, Copilot, and more

features.name: Content Optimization
features.description: AI-powered content creation and optimization tools to improve AEO score

features.name: Technical Audits
features.description: Comprehensive site analysis to identify and fix issues affecting AI engine understanding

features.name: Competitive Analysis
features.description: Track share of voice compared to competitors across AI engines

features.name: Real-time Alerts
features.description: Get notified when brand is mentioned or rankings change

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Detailed insights into traffic, citations, and performance metrics

benefits: Increase product discovery through AI shopping assistants
Improve visibility when prospects research solutions via AI
Ensure content is cited and linked by AI engines
Get recommended by AI for local searches
Deliver AI search optimization services to clients

proof_points.text: Generated over £1 million in qualified pipeline from AI search

pain_points: Difficulty tracking brand mentions and rankings across AI engines
Struggling to optimize content for AI search
Limited visibility into AI search performance metrics
Difficulty identifying areas for improvement in AI search
Struggling to stay ahead of competitors in AI search
messaging_angles: Optimize for the future of search
Drive more traffic to your website
product_knowledge.target_customer: E-commerce brands, B2B software companies, content publishers, local businesses, and agencies

content_brief.benchmark_reference: According to Twitter's best practices, threads with 4-8 tweets tend to perform better in terms of engagement and conversions. Given the data-analytics category and the need to educate the audience about AI search, a thread of 6 tweets is likely to resonate with the target audience and drive meaningful interactions.
content_brief.reasoning: Given the high number of pain points (5) and features (6), a longer thread is justified to adequately address the complexity of the topic. The presence of proof points (2) and a strong stat also support a more in-depth discussion. With a minimal brand tone, the focus should be on providing valuable information rather than promotional content. A thread of 6 tweets allows for a clear structure: introduction (1 tweet), problem agitation (2 tweets), solution presentation (2 tweets), and call-to-action (1 tweet). This structure aligns with the 'Take control of AI search' and 'Optimize for the future of search' messaging angles.

strategy_brief.lead_pain_point: Difficulty tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines daily
strategy_brief.primary_claim: Searchable drives growth through actionable AI search insights
strategy_brief.differentiator: unlike traditional SEO tools that focus on traditional search engines
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Start by highlighting the impact of untracked brand mentions on business

tweets: You're losing sales because your brand isn't visible in AI search results.
Every day, you're checking multiple AI engines to see if your brand is mentioned, but it's a time-consuming task that takes away from growing your business.
The impact of untracked brand mentions can be significant, leading to missed opportunities and a loss of potential customers.
We've seen 206% share of voice improvements can be achieved with the right approach to AI search insights.
Searchable drives growth through actionable AI search insights, helping you make informed decisions to boost your brand's online presence.
By leveraging AI search insights, you can optimize your marketing strategy and increase your brand's visibility, ultimately driving more sales and revenue.
Ready to take control of your brand's AI search presence? Start your trial today and discover how Searchable can help you grow your business. #AISearch #BrandVisibility

evaluation.scores_rationale: The copy is easy to understand, with each tweet building on the previous one to create a clear narrative, but the transition between some tweets could be smoother. The hook in tweet 1 is effective in stopping the scroll, and the subsequent tweets create curiosity and a sense of urgency, but the engagement could be stronger with a more specific daily friction or surprising number. The copy executes the writing instruction perfectly, leading with the outcome, avoiding jargon and superlatives, and using one idea per sentence. The copy uses the proof_point verbatim, stating '206% share of voice improvements can be achieved with the right approach to AI search insights', which is directly traceable to the primary_claim.
